sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 32

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 32:1
items.html:
(to the question) Derech Aliyah [way of ascent]
When the Lights clothe only in the Ohr Chozer [Returning Light] that rises from below upward, and do not spread with the Masach [screen] downward (see Answer 31), this way of clothing is discerned by the name "way of ascent." (There).
